title: German Apple Pie
description: A traditional German dessert made with flaky crust, wensleydale cheese, and sweet apples.
instructions: Roll out the pie crust and place in a pie dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the wensleydale cheese, sweet apples, sugar, and cinnamon.
Fill the pie crust with the apple mixture and dot the top with butter.
Roll out the remaining pie crust and use to cover the pie.
Crimp the edges and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Let the pie cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
